GpuProjectExec
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * lineitem.l_discount)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
          GpuFilterExec
            GpuScanExec: batch_size=25565281
--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
          GpuFilterExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
            GpuScanExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=52
